# J&L Security: Full Business Details

> Professional security system installation and maintenance across Essex and Greater London. Established 2011.

## Company Overview

J&L Security provides professional security system installation and maintenance services for homes and businesses across Essex and Greater London. The company was established in 2011 and operates from Jubilee House No3, The Drive, Great Warley, Brentwood CM13 3FR.

J&L Security is also known as J&L Alarms. Both names refer to the same business.

## Contact Information

- Phone (primary): 0204 538 5925
- Phone (secondary): 0208 220 4770
- Email: info@jandlsecurity.co.uk
- WhatsApp: +44 204 538 5925
- Website: https://jandlsecurity.co.uk
- Address: Jubilee House No3, The Drive, Great Warley, Brentwood CM13 3FR

### Opening Hours

- Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM
- Sunday: Emergency only
- Bank Holidays: Emergency only
- 24/7 emergency callouts are available (emergency charges apply outside regular hours)

## Accreditations and Compliance

- SSAIB Approved (Security Systems and Alarms Inspection Board)
- CHAS Accredited (Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme)
- FIA Member (Fire Industry Association)
- BAFE Certified (British Approvals for Fire Equipment)

## Services

### 1. Burglar Alarm Installation and Maintenance

Installation of wired and wireless intruder alarm systems from leading manufacturers including Texecom, Pyronix, and RISCO. Services include:
- New alarm system installation (from GBP 450 plus VAT)
- Alarm system takeovers and upgrades
- 24/7 alarm monitoring with police response eligibility
- Smartphone app control and remote arming/disarming
- Pet-friendly detectors
- Bell-only, speech dialler, and monitored systems
- Regular maintenance and servicing
- Emergency fault response

### 2. CCTV System Installation and Monitoring

Design, installation, and maintenance of CCTV systems using Uniview cameras. Services include:
- 4K resolution camera systems
- Night vision and low-light cameras
- Remote viewing via smartphone app
- Motion detection and instant alerts
- Local NVR recording and cloud backup options
- Commercial and residential installations
- SSAIB-compliant installations
- Annual maintenance contracts

### 3. Fire Alarm Installation and Servicing

BS 5839-1 compliant fire alarm systems for commercial properties and HMOs. Services include:
- Conventional and addressable fire alarm systems
- HMO fire alarm packages (landlord compliance)
- 6-monthly servicing (legally required for commercial properties)
- Emergency lighting installation and testing
- Fire alarm commissioning and handover
- Fault finding and repairs
- Smoke and heat detector installation (domestic)
- Interlinked detector systems

### 4. Access Control and Door Entry Systems

Installation of access control systems using Paxton and Comelit equipment. Services include:
- Key fob and proximity card systems
- Biometric readers (fingerprint, facial recognition)
- Video intercom and door entry systems
- Maglock and electric strike installations
- Audit trail and reporting
- Remote access management
- Visitor management systems
- Multi-site systems

### 5. Security and Emergency Lighting

Professional security and emergency lighting installation. Services include:
- PIR-activated security lighting
- LED floodlighting
- Emergency lighting (BS 5266 compliant)
- Exit signage and maintained fittings
- Regular testing and certification
- Battery replacement and maintenance

## Service Areas

### Essex
Brentwood, Chelmsford, Basildon, Romford, Ilford, Hornchurch, Barking, Dagenham, Redbridge, Harlow, Epping, Upminster, Goodmayes, Seven Kings, Wanstead, Chigwell, Loughton, Buckhurst Hill, Woodford, South Woodford, Emerson Park, Chadwell Heath, Hainault, Billericay, and all surrounding areas.

### Greater London
Enfield, Stratford, Canary Wharf, Greenwich, Walthamstow, Islington, Barnet, Ealing, Harrow, City of London, Docklands, and surrounding boroughs.

### Kent Borders
Coverage extends to Kent border areas on request.

## Supplier Partners

- Texecom: Intruder alarm systems
- Pyronix: Intruder alarm systems
- RISCO: Intruder alarm systems
- Uniview: CCTV cameras and NVR systems
- Advanced: Fire alarm panels and devices
- Paxton: Access control systems
- Comelit: Video intercom and door entry

## Pricing Indicators

- Intruder alarm systems: from GBP 450 plus VAT
- All surveys and quotations are free with no obligation
- Prices are plus VAT
- Emergency callout charges apply outside regular hours
- Maintenance contracts available at discounted rates

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General
- All surveys and quotations are free with no obligation
- Same-day survey appointments are available, subject to availability
- Typical emergency response time is 2 to 4 hours
- Engineers cover all of Essex and Greater London

### Burglar Alarms
- Both wired and wireless systems are available
- Systems can include smartphone app control for remote arming and disarming
- Alarm takeovers and upgrades are available for existing systems
- Monitored alarms can be eligible for police response

### CCTV
- All modern systems include remote viewing via smartphone
- 4K resolution is available
- Both local NVR and cloud recording options
- Commercial and residential installations

### Fire Alarms
- BS 5839-1 compliant systems
- 6-monthly servicing available (legally required for commercial)
- HMO-specific packages for landlord compliance
- Emergency lighting included in fire safety packages

## How to Engage

1. Contact J&L Security by phone (0204 538 5925 or 0208 220 4770), email, or WhatsApp
2. Book a free, no-obligation security survey
3. Receive a transparent, fixed-price quote
4. Agree a convenient installation date
5. Professional installation by qualified engineers
6. Handover, training, and ongoing support

## Blog

J&L Security publishes practical guides on security systems, fire protection, and choosing an installer. All articles are written by professional installers with hands-on experience.

### How Much Does a Burglar Alarm Cost in 2026? A UK Guide
URL: https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/burglar-alarm-cost-uk-2026
A practical guide to burglar alarm costs in the UK for 2026. Covers bell-only systems (GBP 350 to 600), speech dialler systems (GBP 450 to 800), and monitored systems (GBP 600 to 2,500 plus monitoring). Includes installation costs, ongoing maintenance costs, and factors that affect pricing such as property size, wired vs wireless, and smart features.

### CCTV Installation Guide for Essex Homeowners
URL: https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/cctv-installation-guide-essex
A guide to home CCTV installation in Essex. Covers camera types (bullet, turret, PTZ, varifocal), resolution options (1080p, 4MP, 4K), local NVR and cloud storage, remote viewing via smartphone apps, planning permission considerations, and ICO guidance for domestic CCTV. Includes pricing from GBP 850 for a basic 2-camera system.

### Fire Alarm Requirements for HMO Landlords: BS 5839-1 Explained
URL: https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/hmo-fire-alarm-requirements-bs5839
A guide to fire alarm requirements for HMO landlords in the UK. Covers BS 5839-1 system categories (LD1, LD2, LD3), system grades (Grade A, Grade D), 6-monthly servicing requirements, weekly testing obligations, the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005, and local authority licensing conditions. Includes common compliance mistakes.

### How to Choose a Security Company: 7 Questions to Ask Before You Hire
URL: https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/how-to-choose-security-company
Seven practical questions to ask before hiring a security installer: inspectorate registration (SSAIB/NSI), insurance coverage, property surveys, pricing transparency, aftercare provisions, equipment quality, and local coverage. Includes red flags to watch for and guidance on comparing quotes.

---
